title: More Stands
description: Craft more armor stands in vanilla
body:
# What is it?
Armor stands have quite a few types, but for some reason they aren't obtainable in survival. Well now they are!

You can craft them in crafting tables like any other item! Here are the recipes:

## Regular Vanilla Armor Stand

![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e1df4cfe6c92de8b8224f6feb50d121370295298.png)

## Armed Armor Stand

![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ff86fdaebaeeb3d92d5be0ed28508c5af45f0c98.png)

## Small Armor Stand

![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2c5d04816a755da3ff7deb102d338ae267ad5be2.png)

## Small Armed Armor Stand

![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ff21424b3a5ccb88486c9929fcd430b0ef3b337e.png)

> 
# Installation Guide:
## Data Pack version:
- Download the data pack
- Exit the world you want to install the data pack in
- Select that world in the world selection screen, click on "Edit", then "Open world folder".
- Open the folder named "datapacks", and put the downloaded .zip file into it.
- Now enter the world, and have fun :)

## Mod version:
- Make sure your Minecraft version matches the mod version
- Download the mod
- Go to your main ".minecraft" folder
- Enter the "mods" folder (or if you don't have one yet create one)
- Place the downloaded mod into the mods folder
- Now enter the world, and have fun :)

## Using the Modrinth App on desktop:
- Install the mod/data pack
- That's it, have fun :)
